query:
SELECT fi.name as feed_item, fi.unit,
       rp.qtyPerHead, rp.effectiveDate,
       ac.name as category,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM animals a WHERE a.categoryId = rp.categoryId AND a.isActive = 1 AND a.deletedAt IS NULL) as active_animals,
       rp.qtyPerHead * (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM animals a WHERE a.categoryId = rp.categoryId AND a.isActive = 1 AND a.deletedAt IS NULL) as daily_total
FROM ration_plans rp
JOIN feed_items fi ON rp.feedItemId = fi.id
JOIN animal_categories ac ON rp.categoryId = ac.id
WHERE rp.deletedAt IS NULL
ORDER BY fi.name, rp.effectiveDate DESC;
